top_signals.title: Trump claims Iran deal is 'unconditional surrender,' says his power has 'no limits': Axios
top_signals.summary: Trump said in an interview with Axios on Thursday evening stateside that he negotiated the deal to prevent the conflict from triggering a global depression.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Struggling to find a job? Try looking in Nevada
top_signals.summary: The sparsely populated state known for its world-class casinos and dry climate has been a hiring hot spot.

top_signals.title: Regulator wins decade-long pricing tussle with Pfizer
top_signals.summary: The UK competition watchdog has won permission to appeal in a case against US pharmaceutical giant Pfizer after a long-running legal battle over allegations of excessive pricing, overturning a previous decision by the Tribunal. The court said the Competition Appeal Tribunal (CAT), was “wrong to set aside the [Competition and Market’s Authority’s] decision” in relation to [...]
